next_steps: Punch biopsy of purpuric skin lesions for histopathology, immunohistochemistry, and culture
Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) for smear/culture (fungal, mycobacterial, bacterial) and cytology (Strongyloides larvae)
Stool examination for ova and parasites
Measurement of serum morning cortisol and ACTH stimulation test
Review of pathology from the initial ankle assessment
Empiric ivermectin coverage while awaiting results given high clinical suspicion of strongyloidiasis in an immunosuppressed host
